note: coincidence axis thin under keyword; concept-level needed (F2)
44 memory candidates DOI-verified via Crossref; 2 short-title false-negatives recovered by direct query
BUG: strict mechanism-keyword filter + ranking-distorting query suffixes -> disjoint from A

verdict: INVALID: m=0, samples from disjoint populations (different membership rules)
INVALID: population = broad gamma-function balloon we excluded; A undercounted (missing OpenAlex abstracts)

population: gamma AND function AND mechanism (P') + S2 abstract backfill
verdict: INVALID: P' drops 36/44 canonical in-scope papers (function-forward abstracts lack mechanism keywords); no keyword predicate equals the semantic scope

finding: Automated keyword capture-recapture cannot faithfully sample a mechanism-carries-function scope. Strict filter excludes canonical in-scope papers; loose filter admits the excluded balloon. Escalation to citation-graph sampling required (runbook phase-6).

method: 20 decorrelated elicitation indexes (lab/axis/temporal); each self-verifies+self-judges; union; authoritative Crossref /works/{doi} re-verify of every unique DOI
note: zero hallucinations across 20 subagents; confirm-and-correct snapped all titles/years to Crossref records

caveat: Chao1 biased HIGH by deliberate index decorrelation (subagents avoided cross-bucket papers) -> true overlap higher -> 66% is a conservative FLOOR on memory recall

recall_filter: gamma AND function (NOT gated on mechanism)
note: deliberately high-recall/low-precision; membership decided by judgment not filter

population: single two-stage-judged membership set; channels = memory vs search
correction: abstract-less papers (46) judged by memory harvest not abstract-blind judge (OpenAlex missing abstracts for seminal papers e.g. Fries 2015/2005 -> title-only strict-CTC false 'out')
verdict: VALID capture-recapture; memory & search strongly complementary (21/125 in both; 59 memory-only, 45 search-only)

finding: memory owns old/seminal/abstract-less stratum, search owns recent/indexed -> low overlap is real channel complementarity, not artifact. Estimate consistent with frozen scope (100-250). Combined recall ~51% -> citation-graph is the clear third channel to lift recall.
